title: Stable Diffusion Prompt Book
abstract: Stable Diffusion Prompt Book is a general-purpose LLM that handles conversation, content generation, analysis, and code. It is the closest thing to a full-stack team member you can run on a single ...
abstract_zh: 来个推荐，最近发现了个神器——**Stable Diffusion Prompt Book**。这货简直是个效率小能手，在写周报时帮你生成创意标题；调Bug时给你提供调试思路。它最大的优点就是简单好用，操作起来轻而易举，还能省下你大量的时间。赶紧试试吧！
